{# prospect_card.html — Single prospect contact card with save/promote/delete actions. Receives: p (ProspectContact), vendor (VendorCard). Called by: find_contacts_tab.html loop, and returned by find-contacts POST. Depends on: HTMX for actions, Alpine.js for state. #}
{# Contact info #}
{{ p.full_name }} {% if p.confidence == "medium" %} Medium {% elif p.confidence == "high" %} High {% else %} Low {% endif %} {% if p.is_saved %} Saved {% endif %} {% if p.promoted_to_type %} Promoted {% endif %}
{% if p.title %}

{{ p.title }}

{% endif %}
{% if p.email %} {{ p.email }} {% endif %} {% if p.phone %} {{ p.phone }} {% endif %} {% if p.linkedin_url %} LinkedIn {% endif %}
{# Action buttons #}
{% if not p.promoted_to_type %} {% if not p.is_saved %} {% endif %} {% else %} Added as {{ p.promoted_to_type|replace('_', ' ') }} {% endif %}
